title: Extra asterisks in WhatsApp messages from OpenAI
symptom: Messages sent to WhatsApp from the OpenAI node contain extra asterisks, resulting in formatting issues.
applies_when: Using OpenAI node to send messages
not_this_if: Messages are formatted correctly without extra asterisks
root_cause: The OpenAI model may be generating text with double asterisks for bold formatting, which is not compatible with WhatsApp's expected formatting, leading to display issues.
fix_steps: Instruct the AI model to use only single asterisks for bold formatting.
Alternatively, use the function {{ $json["text"].replace(/\*\*/g, '*') }} to replace all double asterisks in the message string.
agent_instruction: Modify the OpenAI node to ensure single asterisks are used or apply the replacement function.
